reviews.head: Could not love this cleanser more!
reviews.name: lizajw
reviews.review: If I could come up with a dream cleanser on my own, this one would be it. For someone who has dry skin, this cleanser is a LIFE SAVER. My skin never feels dry or stripped after using this, which is amazing. It makes my skin so soft, smooth, and glowy. It also does a pretty great job of taking off any products left on throughout the day. I use it morning and night! And the price point is incredible too! Ticking off all my boxes with this cleanser! THANK YOU CERAVE!

reviews.head: Cleared up my skin!
reviews.name: kmenzel
reviews.review: This cleanser leaves my skin feeling soft and hydrated and in just a couple of weeks cleared all of my acne. I am lucky to have nice skin to begin with but as an athlete, I got acne from sweat in certain areas like between my brows, on my chin and nose and this cleanser cleared it within a couple of weeks. My sensitive skin is clear and I rarely find a pimple on my face anymore since I began using this.

reviews.head: As good as an expensive Spa product
reviews.name: Shirleyjones
reviews.review: I am 68 and have worked in a high-end Spa with extremely expensive skin care products. My local drugstore expert told me about CeraVe saying it used to be prescription only - she highly recommended it. When I saw the words Hyaluronic Acid I knew right away that was good as that is what attracts and binds moisture. Also the fragrance free product was a big plus for me. Although I have very good skin I had a few dry scaly patches near my eyes and mouth that no matter what I used would always resurface. Not any more! This product is gentle and creamy and doesn't leave my skin feeling either dry or greasy. Worth every penny! Highly recommend!

reviews.head: Excellent Product
reviews.name: Ginny
reviews.review: I use CeraVe products exclusively. This cleanser is essential to remove makeup and leaves my skin feeling refreshed, smooth and hydrated. I have used this product for over 2 years and would never use anything else to cleanse my face and neck.

ingredients.head: Ingredients
ingredients.list: AQUA / WATER / EAU, GLYCERIN, CETEARYL ALCOHOL, PEG-40 STEARATE, STEARYL ALCOHOL, POTASSIUM PHOSPHATE, CERAMIDE NP, CERAMIDE AP, CERAMIDE EOP, CARBOMER, GLYCERYL STEARATE, BEHENTRIMONIUM METHOSULFATE, SODIUM LAUROYL LACTYLATE, SODIUM HYALURONATE, CHOLESTEROL, PHENOXYETHANOL, DISODIUM EDTA, DIPOTASSIUM PHOSPHATE, TOCOPHEROL, PHYTOSPHINGOSINE, XANTHAN GUM, CETYL ALCOHOL, POLYSORBATE 20, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN
ingredients.disclaimer: Please be aware that ingredient lists for the products of our brand are updated regularly. Please refer to the ingredient list on your product package for the most up to date list of ingredients to ensure it issuitable to your personal use.(For refilled products in the store, the most up to date list of ingredients should be obtained locally after refill of the product on the point of sale).

ceramides.title: What are Ceramides?
ceramides.description: Ceramides are lipids that make up to ~50% of the skin composition to form the natural skin barrier.

ceramides.title: What Do Ceramides Do?
ceramides.description: Ceramides are essentially the glue that holds our skin cells together to keep our skin barrier intact and healthy. A healthy skin barrier helps seal in moisture and seal out impurities

ceramides.title: CeraVe Contains 3 Essential Ceramides
ceramides.description: CeraVe has a unique blend of ceramides that are identical to those found naturally in your skin. They were carefully selected by dermatologists to help restore the natural skin barrier.

ceramides.title: Restore Your Skin's Natural Barrier
ceramides.description: By replenishing ceramides where they are most needed, CeraVe helps restore your skins natural barrier, helping to keep moisture in and harmful elements out.

steps.description: Massage cleanser into skin in a gentle, circular motion

reviews.head: Fresh clean feel without over-drying
reviews.name: Alicia
reviews.review: This cleanser gives me a really clean feeling after a long day but still feels balanced on my skin. It foams nicely, rinses quickly, and leaves my face feeling refreshed.

reviews.head: Very good for everyday use
reviews.name: Brandon
reviews.review: I use it in the morning and after workouts. It removes oil well and feels lightweight. For me it works best when I follow it with a moisturizer right away.

reviews.head: Reliable and easy to use
reviews.name: Danielle
reviews.review: The pump bottle is convenient and the texture is exactly what I want in a foaming cleanser. It leaves my skin smooth and clean without feeling heavy or sticky.

reviews.head: Great, with only a small downside
reviews.name: Marcus
reviews.review: Overall I like this a lot because it handles shine and buildup well. On colder days my skin can feel a little tight afterward, but with a good moisturizer it works very well.

ingredients.head: Ingredients
ingredients.list: AQUA / WATER / EAU, COCAMIDOPROPYL HYDROXYSULTAINE, GLYCERIN, SODIUM LAUROYL SARCOSINATE, PEG-150 PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRASTEARATE, NIACINAMIDE, CERAMIDE NP, CERAMIDE AP, CERAMIDE EOP, HYALURONIC ACID, CHOLESTEROL, PHENOXYETHANOL, DISODIUM EDTA, CITRIC ACID
ingredients.disclaimer: Please note that ingredient lists may be updated periodically. Refer to the ingredient list on your product packaging for the most current list before use.

ceramides.title: What are Ceramides?
ceramides.description: Ceramides are lipids that help form the skin barrier and support moisture retention.

ceramides.title: Why are they important?
ceramides.description: They help keep skin comfortable by supporting the protective barrier and reducing moisture loss.

ceramides.title: 3 Essential Ceramides
ceramides.description: CeraVe uses 3 essential ceramides to help maintain and restore the skin barrier.

ceramides.title: Balanced cleansing
ceramides.description: The formula helps remove excess oil and impurities while keeping skin feeling clean and comfortable.

steps.description: Massage cleanser onto the face in gentle circular motions

reviews.head: Cleans gently
reviews.name: Mia
reviews.review: I like that this cleanser starts creamy and then foams lightly. It removes daily buildup well and still feels comfortable on dry skin.

reviews.head: Good everyday option
reviews.name: Lena
reviews.review: It is easy to use, rinses clean, and does not leave my skin tight. I would use it morning and night without hesitation.

reviews.head: Works well after makeup
reviews.name: Nadia
reviews.review: This does a nice job removing light makeup and sunscreen. The texture is pleasant and the bottle format is practical.

ingredients.head: Ingredients
ingredients.list: AQUA / WATER / EAU, GLYCERIN, COCAMIDOPROPYL HYDROXYSULTAINE, SODIUM METHYL COCOYL TAURATE, PEG-150 PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRASTEARATE, CERAMIDE NP, CERAMIDE AP, CERAMIDE EOP, HYALURONIC ACID, AMINO ACIDS, CHOLESTEROL, PHENOXYETHANOL, DISODIUM EDTA
ingredients.disclaimer: Ingredient lists may change over time. Please refer to the product packaging for the most up to date ingredient list before use.

ceramides.title: What are Ceramides?
ceramides.description: Ceramides are lipids that support the skin barrier and help maintain moisture.

ceramides.title: Why do they matter?
ceramides.description: They help keep skin feeling balanced by reducing moisture loss and supporting barrier health.

ceramides.title: 3 Essential Ceramides
ceramides.description: CeraVe formulas use 3 essential ceramides to help reinforce the skin barrier.

ceramides.title: Comfortable cleansing
ceramides.description: This cleanser is designed to clean effectively while still feeling gentle on normal to dry skin.

steps.description: Massage gently until the cream transforms into a light foam

reviews.head: Best Moisturizer Ever!!
reviews.name: Dana
reviews.review: This is my holy grail product. I have terribly dry skin, and eczema on my hands and wrists. My dermatologist recommended this stuff, specifically the cream, not the lotion, and it is life changing. (The lotion has more water which will evaporate and leave skin drier than cream) I cant wait to see how it works through the winter. My hands were cracking, bleeding, and weeping last winter from the dry air. I am confident this stuff will help me prevent that continuing, and help my skin recover quicker when it does get too dry. Dreading the harsh New England weather a bit less now.

reviews.head: Absolute love!
reviews.name: mag54
reviews.review: I have been using the moisturizing product for a year now and continued with it being of the remarkable results I have had with it. This cream has all but reduced itching from tight dry skin. I started the cream after I endured a terrible skin affliction. This was recommended by a nurse to help restore my skin and it sure worked. I now use the face hydration cleanser which I really like as well. I recommend this to everyone!

reviews.head: The Best Moisturizer I have ever used
reviews.name: K Austin
reviews.review: I have psoriasis around my mouth area and struggle a lot with it during the fall/winter months when my skin becomes combo/dry. I apply this day and night on my face and it has worked absolute wonders. I will never try another moisturizer!

reviews.head: This is the best face/body lotion I've ever used.
reviews.name: Andrew J
reviews.review: This lotion is the best at keeping both my face and body from getting overly dry in the winter or too oily on those warm, summer days. What I like most about Cerave is that it has no unnecessary colored dyes and is perfume free so that it does not fight with whatever cologne I put on that day. I use it when I am fresh out of the shower to lock in the water still on my face & skin and it always goes on smooth. I purchased several containers for a friend of mine as a casual gift and now she uses and swears by it, too.

ingredients.head: Ingredients
ingredients.list: AQUA / WATER / EAU, GLYCERIN, CETEARYL ALCOHOL, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, CETYL ALCOHOL, CETEARETH-20, PETROLATUM, POTASSIUM PHOSPHATE, CERAMIDE NP, CERAMIDE AP, CERAMIDE EOP, CARBOMER, DIMETHICONE, BEHENTRIMONIUM METHOSULFATE, SODIUM LAUROYL LACTYLATE, SODIUM HYALURONATE, CHOLESTEROL, PHENOXYETHANOL, DISODIUM EDTA, DIPOTASSIUM PHOSPHATE, TOCOPHEROL, PHYTOSPHINGOSINE, XANTHAN GUM, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN

reviews.head: Lightweight and easy to wear
reviews.name: Rachel
reviews.review: This lotion spreads easily and absorbs quickly, so it works well for both daytime and nighttime use. My skin feels soft without feeling greasy.

reviews.head: Hydrating with a clean finish
reviews.name: Owen
reviews.review: I like this because it gives enough moisture for everyday use and still feels light. It is especially good after cleansing or showering.

reviews.head: Good staple moisturizer
reviews.name: Priya
reviews.review: I keep coming back to this lotion because it is dependable and comfortable on my skin. It layers well and does not leave a heavy finish.

reviews.head: Works well, just not rich enough for winter
reviews.name: Steven
reviews.review: I like the texture and how quickly it sinks in. During very cold weather I sometimes want something richer, but for daily use it is a solid option.

ceramides.title: What are Ceramides?
ceramides.description: Ceramides are lipids that help reinforce the skin barrier and keep moisture in.

ceramides.title: Why use them daily?
ceramides.description: They help support the skin barrier each day so skin feels more comfortable and balanced.

ceramides.title: 3 Essential Ceramides
ceramides.description: CeraVe combines 3 essential ceramides to help maintain and restore the skin barrier.

ceramides.title: Lightweight moisture
ceramides.description: The lotion format provides daily hydration with a lighter feel than a richer cream.

steps.description: Apply evenly to face or body as needed

reviews.head: مريح جدا على البشرة
reviews.name: ليان
reviews.review: أنظف بشرتي به صباحا ومساء، وأحب أنه لا يسبب الجفاف. بعد الغسل تبقى البشرة ناعمة ومريحة.

reviews.head: غسول لطيف للاستخدام اليومي
reviews.name: هبة
reviews.review: يعجبني لأنه لطيف وسهل الشطف، وخصوصا عندما تكون البشرة حساسة أو متعبة. أعتبره خيارا عمليا جدا.

reviews.head: ترطيب جيد مع تنظيف خفيف
reviews.name: ريم
reviews.review: القوام ناعم ولا يترك إحساسا مشدودا بعد الغسل. مناسب جدا عندما أحتاج تنظيفا مريحا بدون رغوة قوية.

ingredients.head: المكونات

ceramides.description: السيراميدات دهون طبيعية تساعد على تكوين حاجز البشرة والحفاظ على الترطيب.

ceramides.description: تساعد على الحفاظ على راحة البشرة وتقليل فقدان الرطوبة ودعم الحاجز الواقي.

ceramides.title: 3 سيراميدات أساسية
ceramides.description: تركيبة CeraVe تحتوي على 3 سيراميدات أساسية للمساعدة في دعم الحاجز الطبيعي للبشرة.

ceramides.title: تنظيف لطيف
ceramides.description: يساعد على إزالة الشوائب مع الحفاظ على ملمس ناعم ومريح للبشرة العادية إلى الجافة.

steps.description: اشطفي جيدا ثم جففي البشرة برفق

reviews.head: يشعرك بالنظافة والانتعاش
reviews.name: مريم
reviews.review: هذا الغسول ينظف الدهون والشوائب بشكل واضح ويترك البشرة منتعشة. أحب الرغوة الخفيفة وسهولة الشطف.

reviews.head: جيد جدا للاستخدام اليومي
reviews.name: خالد
reviews.review: أستخدمه بعد التمرين وفي الصباح. يعطي تنظيفا جيدا، لكنني أفضل أن أتبعه بمرطب مباشرة خصوصا في الطقس الجاف.

reviews.head: غسول عملي ومتوازن
reviews.name: دانا
reviews.review: القوام والرغوة مناسبين جدا، والمنتج سهل الاستخدام يوميا. النتيجة بشرة نظيفة بدون شعور مزعج.

ceramides.title: تنظيف متوازن
ceramides.description: تساعد التركيبة على إزالة الدهون والشوائب مع الحفاظ على إحساس مريح ومتوازن.

reviews.head: لطيف وفعال
reviews.name: نورا
reviews.review: أحب هذا الغسول لأنه يزيل المكياج الخفيف بدون أن يترك البشرة مشدودة. القوام كريمي في البداية ثم يتحول إلى رغوة ناعمة بسهولة.

reviews.head: مناسب للبشرة الحساسة
reviews.name: سارة
reviews.review: استخدمه صباحا ومساء. ينظف بشكل جيد جدا، ويترك البشرة مريحة وناعمة بدون أي إحساس بالجفاف.

reviews.head: عملي للاستخدام اليومي
reviews.name: مها
reviews.review: المنتج ممتاز للاستخدام اليومي، خصوصا إذا كنت أريد تنظيفا سريعا ولطيفا في نفس الوقت. أحب أنه لا يسبب تهيجا حول العينين.

اشطفي جيدا ثم جففي البشرة برفق

reviews.head: مرطب غني جدا
reviews.name: يارا
reviews.review: أستخدمه للمناطق شديدة الجفاف وفي المساء. القوام غني ويعطي إحساسا واضحا بالراحة بعد الاستخدام.

reviews.head: مناسب للأيام الجافة
reviews.name: منى
reviews.review: عندما تكون البشرة جافة جدا يكون هذا الكريم خيارا ممتازا. كمية صغيرة تكفي ويستمر الإحساس بالترطيب لفترة جيدة.

reviews.head: قوام غني لكن عملي
reviews.name: فهد
reviews.review: المنتج فعال جدا للمناطق الخشنة والجافة. بالنسبة لي هو ممتاز خصوصا في الليل أو بعد الاستحمام.

ceramides.title: ترطيب غني
ceramides.description: القوام الكريمي الغني يساعد على تهدئة الجفاف وترك البشرة أكثر نعومة وراحة.

reviews.head: خفيف ومريح
reviews.name: آية
reviews.review: اللوشن خفيف ويمتص بسرعة، لذلك يناسب الاستخدام اليومي صباحا ومساء. يترك البشرة ناعمة بدون ملمس دهني.

reviews.head: ترطيب جيد بشكل يومي
reviews.name: طارق
reviews.review: أستخدمه بعد الغسل أو بعد الاستحمام. النتيجة مريحة ومرطبة، لكنه قد لا يكون كافيا وحده في الأجواء الباردة جدا.

reviews.head: خيار أساسي ممتاز
reviews.name: سلمى
reviews.review: أحب هذا اللوشن لأنه بسيط وعملي ويعطي ترطيبا جيدا مع إحساس خفيف على البشرة. أعود إليه دائما.

ceramides.title: ما هي السيراميدات؟
ceramides.description: السيراميدات دهون تساعد على تقوية حاجز البشرة والحفاظ على الرطوبة.

ceramides.title: لماذا للاستخدام اليومي؟
ceramides.description: تساعد على دعم راحة البشرة يوميا والحفاظ على توازنها.

ceramides.title: 3 سيراميدات أساسية
ceramides.description: تجمع CeraVe بين 3 سيراميدات أساسية للمساعدة في دعم الحاجز الطبيعي للبشرة.

ceramides.title: ترطيب خفيف
ceramides.description: صيغة اللوشن تعطي ترطيبا يوميا بملمس أخف من الكريم الغني.

steps.description: ضعي كمية مناسبة من اللوشن على اليدين

reviews.head: Muy buena para piel seca
reviews.name: Laura
reviews.review: La uso en rostro y cuerpo. Tiene una textura rica pero se absorbe bien y deja la piel calmada durante muchas horas.

reviews.head: Ideal para uso diario
reviews.name: Marta
reviews.review: Me gusta porque hidrata bastante sin perfume fuerte. La aplico después de la ducha y noto la piel mucho más suave.

reviews.head: Buena opción para todo el año
reviews.name: Carlos
reviews.review: Funciona muy bien en codos, manos y zonas secas. El formato grande también es práctico para tenerlo siempre en casa.

ingredients.head: Ingredientes
ingredients.list: AQUA / WATER / EAU, GLYCERIN, CETEARYL ALCOHOL, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, CETYL ALCOHOL, CETEARETH-20, PETROLATUM, POTASSIUM PHOSPHATE, CERAMIDE NP, CERAMIDE AP, CERAMIDE EOP, CARBOMER, DIMETHICONE, BEHENTRIMONIUM METHOSULFATE, SODIUM LAUROYL LACTYLATE, SODIUM HYALURONATE, CHOLESTEROL, PHENOXYETHANOL, DISODIUM EDTA, DIPOTASSIUM PHOSPHATE, TOCOPHEROL, PHYTOSPHINGOSINE, XANTHAN GUM, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN
ingredients.disclaimer: Las listas de ingredientes pueden cambiar. Consulta el envase del producto para obtener la información más actualizada antes de usarlo.

ceramides.title: ¿Qué son las ceramidas?
ceramides.description: Las ceramidas son lípidos que ayudan a formar la barrera natural de la piel.

ceramides.title: ¿Para qué sirven?
ceramides.description: Ayudan a retener la hidratación y a proteger la piel frente a agresores externos.

ceramides.title: 3 ceramidas esenciales
ceramides.description: La fórmula de CeraVe combina 3 ceramidas esenciales para apoyar la barrera cutánea.

ceramides.title: Hidratación duradera
ceramides.description: Su textura rica ayuda a aliviar la sequedad y deja la piel con sensación confortable.

steps.description: Toma una cantidad adecuada del tarro
Aplícala sobre la piel limpia y seca

reviews.head: Ligera y cómoda
reviews.name: Elena
reviews.review: Se extiende muy bien y se absorbe rápido. La uso a diario y deja la piel suave sin sensación pesada.

reviews.head: Buena hidratación diaria
reviews.name: Pablo
reviews.review: Me gusta porque hidrata lo suficiente para el día a día y sigue sintiéndose ligera. Después de la ducha funciona muy bien.

reviews.head: Una loción muy práctica
reviews.name: Natalia
reviews.review: Es una buena opción cuando quiero hidratación sencilla y efectiva. La textura es cómoda y deja un acabado agradable.

ingredients.head: Ingredientes
ingredients.list: AQUA / WATER / EAU, GLYCERIN, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, CETEARYL ALCOHOL, CETYL ALCOHOL, DIMETHICONE, CERAMIDE NP, CERAMIDE AP, CERAMIDE EOP, HYALURONIC ACID, CHOLESTEROL, PHENOXYETHANOL, DISODIUM EDTA, PHYTOSPHINGOSINE, XANTHAN GUM
ingredients.disclaimer: Las listas de ingredientes pueden cambiar. Consulta el envase del producto para obtener la información más actualizada antes de usarlo.

ceramides.title: ¿Qué son las ceramidas?
ceramides.description: Las ceramidas ayudan a reforzar la barrera cutánea y a mantener la hidratación.

ceramides.title: ¿Por qué usarlas a diario?
ceramides.description: Ayudan a mantener la piel más cómoda y equilibrada a lo largo del día.

ceramides.title: 3 ceramidas esenciales
ceramides.description: CeraVe combina 3 ceramidas esenciales para ayudar a mantener la barrera natural de la piel.

ceramides.title: Hidratación ligera
ceramides.description: La textura en loción ofrece hidratación diaria con una sensación más ligera que una crema rica.

steps.description: Aplicar una cantidad generosa tantas veces como sea necesario o según las indicaciones del médico
